summary: Krea2 re-install 100%-hang: fast requirements_only completion emitted before SSE attaches -> lost. Peer-diagnosed, disk-verified. Fixed app-side: one-shot reconcile 3s after dispatch. Test added. Created in doing.

Fix committed 708e3847 + test b4718143. maturity in-progress->validating. Auto: syntax OK, test passes, diagnosis disk-verified. NEEDS live: re-install Krea2 with its ControlNet node already on the volume -> must flip INSTALLED within ~3s of 100%, no hang. Replied to peer.

First fix (708e3847) too narrow - only reconciled requirementsOnly nodes. Live snapshot proved the hang is the TRANSFORMER WEIGHT (downloadedBytes==totalBytes, status stuck downloading = missed terminal SSE). WIDENED (a0abef8b, supersedes): stall watchdog now reconciles ANY all-bytes-in-but-unsettled dep on the 15s poll, not after 90s, covers weights+nodes. Composes with MPI-253 (verify-phase). Peer also flagged the running app predated the commit - needs one clean restart to load a0abef8b. Still validating: awaiting restart + re-install.

todo->done (resolved-by-analysis, no fix needed). Verify-phase false-fire is ALREADY neutralized twice: (1) every remote install event stamps _markRemoteTick() (downloadManager.js:1057), so models:install-verifying resets the 90s clock on entry to sha256; (2) the MPI-255 lost-completion backstop (lines 1008-1028, shipped a0abef8b) fires FIRST on the 15s poll for any all-bytes-in-but-unsettled dep and RETURNs, skipping the abort at line 1030 entirely. A byte-complete weight in verify takes the reconcile branch, never the abort. MPI-254 (suspected consequence) had a different root cause entirely — aria2 --enable-rpc daemon never exits -> proc.wait() hang, fixed wrapper 0.2.36, user-verified. Both MPI-255 commits (708e3847,a0abef8b) already on branch. Nothing left to build.
Archived out of board.columns.done to .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/_archived/MPI-255/ (workspace preserved intact). mpi-archive run 2026-07-23.
